item.title: 🇶🇦 Qatari negotiators travel to Tehran to narrow gaps in US-Iran talks
item.description: Qatari mediators are working to bridge remaining differences between Washington and Tehran as ceasefire talks continue. The diplomatic effort comes amid fragile truce conditions.
item.dc:creator: Al Arabiya

item.title: 🇮🇷 US and allies condemn Iran for lethal plotting in Europe and North America
item.description: The US, Britain, and other allies issued a joint condemnation of Iran's IRGC for plotting assassinations and intimidation campaigns on Western soil, highlighting Tehran's global reach.
item.dc:creator: Al Arabiya

item.title: 🚢 Cargo vessel exchanges fire with armed craft off Yemen coast
item.description: A commercial ship reported engaging with an armed vessel 88 nautical miles southwest of Yemen, raising concerns about renewed Houthi or pirate activity in the Red Sea region.
item.dc:creator: Al Arabiya

item.title: 🇹🇼 US-Taiwan drone relationship shifts as Taipei develops own exports
item.description: While the US traditionally sells weapons to Taiwan, the island's growing drone industry is now developing systems for potential export, marking a reversal in defense trade dynamics.
item.dc:creator: Defense News

item.title: 🇩🇪 German consortium plans new fighter jet after Franco-German FCAS collapse
item.description: Airbus-led group to present plans for a next-generation fighter to replace the stalled FCAS project with France, signaling potential fracturing of European defense cooperation.
item.dc:creator: France 24

item.title: 🇮🇷⚔️🇺🇸 US Strikes Iran, Tehran Fires Back at American Bases
item.description: The United States launched airstrikes on Iranian military sites after an Apache helicopter was downed near the Strait of Hormuz. Iran retaliated by targeting US bases in Jordan and the Gulf as President Trump warned Tehran would pay the price for stalled negotiations.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: 🇨🇳🇰🇵🤝 Xi Jinping Visits North Korea, Deepens Ties with Kim Jong Un
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping wrapped up his first visit to North Korea in seven years, agreeing to expand cooperation with Kim Jong Un. Both leaders claimed major wins but analysts note limits remain, particularly on Pyongyang nuclear program.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇦💥🇷🇺 Ukraine Launches Long-Range Strikes Deep Inside Russia
item.description: Ukrainian forces conducted long-range strikes targeting military and energy sites deep inside Russia. The attacks are part of Kyiv efforts to raise the costs of the ongoing war as the conflict continues.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: 🇦🇷📉💰 Argentine Peso Drops Most in Eight Weeks After Midterm Selloff
item.description: Argentina peso is facing renewed decline as investors grow more risk-averse following midterm election results. The drop highlights ongoing economic challenges facing the country recovery efforts.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg

item.title: 🇵🇰🚁💀 Pakistan Military Helicopter Crashes in Kashmir, All Killed
item.description: A Pakistani military helicopter crashed in Pakistan-administered Kashmir, killing everyone on board. The incident comes amid heavy security presence and protests in the region in recent days.
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistan Launches Deadly Airstrikes on Afghanistan, Killing at Least 13 Including Children
item.description: Pakistani airstrikes targeted three Afghan provinces killing at least 13 people including 11 children, the Taliban government said, marking a major escalation in border tensions.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇬🇧 Masked Men Burn Families Out of Homes in Belfast Anti-Immigrant Riots
item.description: A wave of anti-immigrant violence swept Belfast after a Sudanese man was charged with attempted murder for a knife attack. Masked men torched homes and vehicles across Northern Ireland.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🛢️ Oil Prices Rise 2% as Trump Says Iran Will Pay Price for Stalled Talks
item.description: Oil prices climbed after President Trump warned Iran would face consequences for delays in negotiations, following tit-for-tat strikes between US and Iranian forces overnight.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Launches Long-Range Strikes Deep Inside Russia
item.description: Ukrainian forces hit military and energy targets deep inside Russia in a series of long-range attacks, striking a military plant, oil refinery, and shadow fleet tanker in the Black Sea.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇪🇺 ECB and Bank of England face difficult rate decisions as Iran war drives inflation
item.description: European Central Bank and Bank of England policymakers are weighing competing risks as the Iran conflict pushes energy prices higher, forcing them to choose between fighting inflation and supporting growth.
item.dc:creator: Politico

item.title: 🇹🇷 Erdogan warns Israel attacks on Syria and Lebanon threaten Turkiye directly
item.description: Turkish President Erdogan said Israeli operations in Syria and Lebanon have escalated to the point where they pose a direct threat to Turkey, calling the aggression a danger to the entire region.
item.dc:creator: Al Arabiya

item.title: 🇹🇷 Erdogan declares Turkiye security begins from Aleppo, Damascus and Beirut
item.description: The Turkish president stated that his countrys security perimeter extends into Syria and Lebanon, as Israel continues operations against Hezbollah and other targets in those countries.
item.dc:creator: Naharnet

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine warns Russian attacks on Odesa ports threaten grain export collapse
item.description: Russian strikes on Black Sea ports have damaged export terminals, threatening significant reduction in agricultural shipments. Ukraine's largest farmers' union warns of dire consequences for global food supplies.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU proposes 21st sanctions package against Russia targeting banks and crypto
item.description: The European Union unveiled its latest sanctions package, heavily targeting Russian banks, crypto networks, drone production, and oil traders. EU chief diplomat Kaja Kallas announced the measures.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: ⛪ Amnesty accuses Israel of ethnic cleansing of West Bank Palestinians
item.description: Amnesty International has accused Israel of carrying out a campaign of "ethnic cleansing" against Palestinians in the occupied West Bank, saying measures are designed to accelerate annexation of Palestinian territory.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistan claims killing 26 Afghan fighters; Taliban says civilians died
item.description: Pakistan targeted TTP fighters across the Afghan border, with the Taliban reporting 11 children among those killed in air strikes. The strike marks an escalation in cross-border tensions.
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera

item.title: ⚔️🇮🇷 Iran strikes US bases in Jordan and Gulf after Trump orders attacks near Hormuz
item.description: Iran launched strikes against US military bases in Jordan and the Gulf region in retaliation for American attacks near the strategic Strait of Hormuz, further straining an already fragile ceasefire between Washington and Tehran.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇹🇼🚀 Taiwan test fires US rocket system toward Chinese mainland for first time
item.description: Taiwan fired HIMARS rockets toward China in its first such test, a significant escalation of military demonstrations as cross-strait tensions continue to rise.
item.dc:creator: NBC News

item.title: 🇬🇷🏛️ Greece approves faster migrant returns and plans return hubs
item.description: The Greek parliament approved legislation to accelerate the return of migrants who do not qualify for asylum and aims to establish return processing hubs, part of broader EU efforts to manage migration flows.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇵🇭🇯🇵 Philippines to pursue maritime border talks with Japan despite China opposition
item.description: Manila plans to delimit sea boundaries with Tokyo, a move Beijing opposes as both nations face separate maritime disputes with China in the East China Sea and South China Sea.
item.dc:creator: Nikkei Asia
